data.name: Back to the College
data.detailed_description:
Back to the College is a choice-based visual novel where every decision shapes your story. After a fatal incident, a brilliant but troubled lawyer is given a second chance—in the unexpected form of a 25 years old guy’s body. Guided by a clumsy angel and a seductive demon, you must navigate your new life, uncover hidden secrets, and decide what kind of person you want to become... this time.

The game features a rich cast of diverse and memorable characters, each with their own goals, secrets, and potential relationships. Will you flirt, investigate, betray, or protect? It’s up to you. Every path leads to different consequences, and no two playthroughs will be the same.

Set in a mysterious academic world where law, love, and the supernatural collide, Back to the College offers a unique narrative experience full of romance, tension, and dark humor.

Key Features:

  • Choice-driven storytelling: your decisions shape the plot and relationships

  • Multiple endings based on your actions, alliances, and moral choices

  • Interact with a large and varied cast: wonderful woman, professors, faculty, angels, demons, and more

  • Romantic routes, mysteries to solve, and secrets to uncover

  • Philosophical and legal dilemmas presented through dialogue and in-game events

data.short_description: A choice-based visual novel where your decisions shape the story. Relive college life, interact with dozens of characters, uncover secrets, and decide who you want to be in your second chance at life.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: gtx 1660
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
